title: delphinium elbursense var. elbursense
intro: Delphinium elbursense var. elbursense, also known as Elburz delphinium, is a variety of the Delphinium elbursense plant, a species of flowering plant in the family Ranunculaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly for its analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been attributed to the presence of delphinine and other alkaloids. The health benefits of Delphinium elbursense var. elbursense include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as having antimicrobial and antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a variety of health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues.
